item.title: Big Guy Dumps on Little Guy, Little Guy Explodes!
item.description: https://arstechnica.com/science/2024/05/if-you-can-see-the-big-dipper-youll-get-to-see-a-star-go-nova-soon/ A white dwarf star and a red giant star are locked in a binary dance. The red giant keeps offthrowing material, primarily hydrogen, which accumulates on the white dwarf until a massive fusion explosion, or nova, occurs. This happens about every eighty years They expect the next nova between now and September, and say that it should be visible with the naked eye. Neat!
item.dc:creator: fearlessfloyd

item.title: I have nothing to offer but a cat
item.description: Apparently its my cake day! I don't think I have much of interest, so I present my sleeping cat holding his toes in the hopes this is an acceptable offering to the community!

item.title: Captain, I'm sensing very strong, inappropriate emotions!
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.description: Flying around India anytime soon? You might be jetted around by a woman! The country takes first place with the most female pilots—12.4%, higher than the global average of only 5%. Ireland and South Africa follow closely behind with nearly 10%. We love to see women in the pilot’s seat
item.dc:creator: darpaslittleprincess

item.title: Images of Note: Kobolds are immune to fall damage
item.description:
Headphone warning, but sound on, this had me dying yesterday.
yes I do
:3
On no
https://arstechnica.com/gadgets/2024/05/microsofts-new-recall-feature-will-record-everything-you-do-on-your-pc/ "Hey Abbie, why did you switch to Linux?"
https://arstechnica.com/gadgets/2024/05/microsofts-new-recall-feature-will-record-everything-you-do-on-your-pc/ Seriously everyone needs to know about this, this is not cool and we shouldn't fucking be cool with it. They're literally going to be spying on your screen and reading what you're doing.
Jesus was just a very determined speedrunner.
Let's fucking hope not.
Gonna play basketball with one.
This is a very good way of being ungovernable.
bald
they see you.
GIMP is very good though. Dunno what kinda sex act Kdenlive is.
basically me
I hate the future.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREEEEEEEEEEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Suriname toads are best known for their remarkable reproductive habits..
item.description: The eggs are implanted in the female's back and sink into the skin to form pockets over a period of several days, eventually taking on the appearance of an irregular honeycomb.
item.dc:creator: maureoko
